name: Suriya V
tagline: Software Developer specialising in Laravel & PHP — building scalable web applications, RESTful APIs, and enterprise systems with

points: Building Drift AI, an in-house CRM product for lead management and agent retention — personally delivered 3–5 production modules.
Architected a globally configurable settings engine enabling admins to modify workflows dynamically without redeployment.
Managing code quality via Bitbucket with structured branching, pull requests, and peer reviews in Agile/Scrum sprints.
Led full Laravel 5 to Laravel 10 migration for SSM, a supply chain system managing lakhs of records — zero downtime achieved.
Executed server migration on Ubuntu/Apache2, improving performance and scalability significantly.
Mentored junior developers and acted as primary client liaison for requirement gathering and delivery.
Worked on B2C e-commerce and timesheet projects — built Laravel modules and integrated Razorpay payment gateway.
Collaborated with senior developers on OCI, an Oman Government tender and compliance portal with complex business logic.

projects.title: Drift AI — CRM & Lead Management
projects.description: In-house CRM product tracking the full customer journey — lead capture, agent assignment, activity monitoring, and retention reporting. Built a dynamic configuration engine cutting deployment overhead significantly.

projects.title: SSM — Retail Supply Chain System
projects.description: High-volume supply chain platform managing lakhs of records across the full order lifecycle. Led Laravel 5 to 10 migration and zero-downtime server upgrade, improving reliability and performance.

projects.title: OCI — Oman Government Portal
projects.description: Government-grade tender and compliance portal for Oman — handling full tender lifecycle, quarterly investigation planning, and inter-department communication with complete audit trails.

projects.title: Digital Wall AI — Digital Business Card
projects.description: Corporate digital business card platform — companies create branded digital cards shared via QR code scan. Recipients instantly get company and contact details. Works on both web and mobile app via API.

projects.title: Mini CRM — Vue 3 & Laravel 12
projects.description: Personal project — a CRM built with Vue 3 frontend and Laravel 12 API backend featuring user authentication, dashboard analytics, contact management, and lead tracking. Currently in progress.
